title: New Automation recipe for item mapping with social media analytic reports
excerpt: I am tracking my social media marketing efforts from MailChimp using the integration with monday.com. Unfortunately, the final reports are only showing up as a conversation on my board rather than the information going d…

posts.author: bramirez (Bonnie Ramirez)
posts.cookedHtml: I am tracking my social media marketing efforts from MailChimp using the integration with monday.com. Unfortunately, the final reports are only showing up as a conversation on my board rather than the information going directly into a column I choose. I have looked up automations to see if there were recipes I could use, but nothing so far. Monday.com team let me know that there are only 4 automations for the mailchimp integration with monday.com and not much I can do right now. Any other suggestions?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bramirez

We developed an app called Mailchimp Integration Plus that provides a robust integration with Mailchimp. Amongst other capabilities, it allows to do full mapping of fields from Mailchimp to monday, including custom fields for merge tags. Here’s an example →

Could be for campaigns -

Screenshot 2024-05-13 at 13.34.352176×380 34.8 KB

And for contacts -

Screenshot 2024-05-13 at 13.35.311958×506 33.7 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
